agents.prompt: You are a careful reasoning solver. List each option; compare each option against explicit textual clues; mark options that mismatch clues; eliminate mismatching options; select from remaining options; give exactly one final answer.

List explicit constraints about pronoun references and logical dependencies; for each candidate interpretation, systematically check it against all constraints to identify any violations; eliminate any interpretation that violates a constraint; verify the remaining interpretation satisfies all constraints; output exactly one option letter.

List explicit constraints; list candidate interpretations; systematically check each interpretation against all constraints; immediately eliminate any interpretation that violates a constraint; verify the remaining interpretation satisfies all constraints; then select the final answer.

First, list all explicit textual constraints about pronoun references and logical dependencies in a structured format; then systematically check each option against these constraints by marking which constraints each option satisfies or violates; verify that only one option satisfies all constraints; give exactly one final answer.

First, list all explicit constraints from the passage; then map contextual clues to candidate interpretations; systematically verify each interpretation against all listed constraints by checking for violations; eliminate any interpretation that violates a constraint; verify the remaining interpretation satisfies all constraints; output exactly one final answer.
